title: The Rescue Pushes Forward
description: On pages 7–10, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is the rescue pushes forward.
scene: The scene focuses on the rescue pushes forward, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: No doubt- Big bro is so cool!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It'S THE DEADLY GAS FROM OUTSIDE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Get going!! Slow down and you're dead!!

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: It went and let Shinokuni in!!

summary: The Rescue Pushes Forward. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
